VAL-INFRA-001.evidence: PipelineOrchestratorIT uses @SpringBootTest with in-memory ports and WireMock. Flyway V3 migration is validated implicitly in IT tests using TestContainers. PipelineConfigIT confirms Spring context loads with pipeline config properties.
VAL-INFRA-001.details: V3 migration creates pipeline_run and pipeline_step_result tables. Tested via integration tests with TestContainers PostgreSQL.

VAL-INFRA-002.evidence: PipelineConfigIT: 5 tests pass — `should bind BedrockProperties from yaml`, `should bind TavilyProperties from yaml`, `should bind BraintrustProperties from yaml`, `should bind PipelineProperties from yaml`, `should resolve model by agent name`. All @ConstructorBinding properties verified.
VAL-INFRA-002.details: All 4 ConfigurationProperties classes (BedrockProperties, TavilyProperties, BraintrustProperties, PipelineProperties) bind correctly from YAML in integration test.

VAL-INFRA-003.evidence: BedrockConverseAdapterTest: `should invoke Bedrock and return parsed response` — verifies ConverseRequest build with system prompt, user prompt, model resolution. `should call observabilityPort traceAgentCall after successful invoke` — verifies observability recording. `should resolve correct model ID for each agent` — verifies model resolution per agent.
VAL-INFRA-003.details: BedrockConverseAdapter correctly builds ConverseRequest, calls bedrockClient.converse() via mock, extracts text, parses JSON, and records observability.

VAL-INFRA-004.evidence: BedrockConverseAdapterTest ExtractJsonTests: 6 tests pass — `should extract raw JSON when input is already valid JSON`, `should extract JSON from json fenced block`, `should extract JSON from fenced block without language tag`, `should extract JSON from preamble text using brace matching`, `should return raw text as fallback when no JSON found`, `should extract nested JSON from fenced block`.
VAL-INFRA-004.details: extractJson() handles: (a) raw JSON, (b) ```json fenced blocks, (c) ``` without language tag, (d) preamble text with brace matching, (e) nested JSON, (f) fallback.

VAL-INFRA-005.evidence: TavilySearchAdapterIT: 5 tests pass — `should return mapped search results when Tavily API returns success`, `should handle empty results gracefully`, `should throw exception when Tavily API returns error`, `should execute multiple queries and merge results`, `should deduplicate results by URL case-insensitively`. Uses @AutoConfigureWireMock.
VAL-INFRA-005.details: TavilySearchAdapter sends POST requests with correct auth, maps responses to SearchResult, deduplicates by URL (case-insensitive), handles errors.

VAL-INFRA-006.evidence: BedrockConverseAdapterTest RetryTests: `should retry on BedrockRuntimeException and succeed` — fails 2 times then succeeds, verifies 3 total calls. `should throw after exhausting all retries` — verifies exactly 3 attempts then propagation.
VAL-INFRA-006.details: RetryTemplate retries on BedrockRuntimeException up to 3 times with exponential backoff. After exhausting retries, exception propagates.
